item.title: Moldwasher launches June 23
item.content:encoded:
• PC

Cozy arcade-style fridge-cleaning adventure game dated.

Cozy arcade-style fridge-cleaning adventure game Moldwasher will launch for PC via Steam on June 23, Anshar Publishing and developer Rubel Games announced.

Here is an overview of the game, via its Steam page:

About

Clean moldy messes as a brave food hero! Equip your high-pressure spray, choose the right nozzle, and clear away sticky messes in this cozy, arcade-style fridge-cleaning adventure.

Turn Grime Into Shine—At Your Own Pace

Open the door to a long-forgotten fridge and become a true sanitation hero! In this meditative arcade game, you control a guy with a pressure stream to clean off mold that has taken over food, shelves, drawers and even the freezer.

Key Features

  • Pressure-Powered Gameplay – Aim, spray, and swap cleaning modes. Blast away mold, shoo back pesky enemies, and leave sparkling cleanliness behind.
  • Choose the Best Tool – Wield a pressure washer, leaf blower, axe, and more to tackle stubborn grime across the kitchen. Adapt your approach and level up each tool to boost your skills and make your gear even more powerful!
  • Varied Locations – From cluttered kitchens to treasure piles and spooky sewers, every corner hides something to scrub. Make your kitchen shine and peek behind jars in the fridge—you never know what you can find there!
  • Strange and Sticky Foes – Tackle colorful, iridescent, ghostly, crystalline, and even mimic molds, each with unique behaviors.
  • Adorable Food Heroes – You’re not a knight or soldier, you’re a healthy meal on a mission. Play as sensible meals determined to defeat mold and stay fresh.
  • Progression and Unlocks – Earn new heroes, audio tracks, and cosmetic items to personalize your basement. Cash in your points for shinier and stronger gear at the store—because clean heroes deserves style.
  • Relaxing Yet Addictive – A chill soundtrack and satisfying cleaning sounds make every spray extremely calming.

Watch a new trailer below.

Release Date Trailer
